name: Turkey Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh chopped vegetables of your choice
recipeInstructions:
Combine mother sauce, soy sauce, ginger, sherry, and garlic with the turkey ingredients and freeze in a zip-close bag until needed. Defrost.
To serve, drain the turkey, reserving the sauce and picking out the garlic. Heat sesame oil and corn oil very hot in a skillet.
Add chopped vegetables (such as broccoli, snow peas, baby corn, sliced scallions) to the skillet. Add water chestnuts and bamboo shoots. If needed, add a small amount of reserved sauce to moisten the vegetables and prevent sticking.
Stir fry the vegetables until coated, then add the turkey. When the turkey begins to brown in the oil, gradually add the sauce until well coated and the sauce has thickened. Serve over rice with bowls of cashews and sliced oranges.
